scripts.start:frontend: cross-env NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 npm run dev --prefix frontend/bestivale-ui -- --port 4401
scripts.watch:backend: cross-env ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development dotnet watch run --no-launch-profile --urls http://localhost:5375 --project backend/Bestivale.API/Bestivale.API.csproj
